# impact_analysis.snippet.md

## Use
Find affected modules before creating a spec.

## Prompt
```
Perform impact analysis.
Input:
- Entry point/API: <value>
- Requirement summary: <short bullets>
Output format:
1) Affected files/modules only
2) Affected contracts/interfaces
3) High-risk areas
Do not include full code.
Keep under 220 tokens.
```
